text: “Enough!” Trump Stuns Zionist Supporters by Scolding Israel Over Lebanon Trump shocked his Zionist allies on Friday, declaring he had “barred” Israel from bombing Lebanon after the ceasefire. “Enough is enough!”, he further rebuked Israel. Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu said he accepted the truce at the “request” of his “friend” Trump. READ MORE
text_zh: “够了！”特朗普因黎巴嫩问题训斥以色列，震惊其犹太复国主义支持者。周五，特朗普震惊了他的犹太复国主义盟友，宣布他已“禁止”以色列在停火后轰炸黎巴嫩。“够了就是够了！”，他进一步斥责以色列。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他是在其“朋友”特朗普的“请求”下接受停火的。阅读更多

text: 🇮🇷 Most of the tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz this morning are all linked to Iran/Russia/China & US-sanctioned. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 💬 We're not even in the middle, we're just at the beginning of the path to a multipolar world — Lavrov This will be a historic, painful era, because we will have to abandon old habits, he added 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸 Spokesperson Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters Ebrahim Zolfaghari announced that the Strait of Hormuz has been closed to shipping due to the ongoing US naval blockade, hinting that it will remain closed for as long as the blockade is in play.…" ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The IRGC Navy warned that the U.S. will be met with a fitting response for each breach of the deal to open the Strait of Hormuz. They added that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed for as long as vessels coming to and from Iran remain under threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里宣布，由于美国持续的海军封锁，霍尔木兹海峡已对航运关闭，并暗示只要封锁还在，它将保持关闭……” ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队海军警告称，美国对每一次违反开放霍尔木兹海峡协议的行为都将受到相应的回应。他们补充说，只要往返伊朗的船只仍受到威胁，霍尔木兹海峡将保持关闭。@wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Border Guard drone pilots from RUBpAK Prime destroyed enemy vehicles, comms gear, dugouts and shelters in the Northern Slobozhansky sector. The occupiers also suffered significant manpower losses, the unit says. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045439394966802602/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 来自RUBpAK Prime的边防无人机飞行员在北部斯洛博然斯克地区摧毁了敌方车辆、通讯设备、掩体和避难所。该部队称，占领者也遭受了重大人员损失。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045439394966802602/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Putin’s special envoy Dmitriev claims the new 30-day extension letting Russian oil in transit bypass sanctions covers over 100 million barrels again. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045435116437016659/photo/1 US has extended the waiver allowing countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil until May 16, Reuters reports. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 普京的特使德米特里耶夫声称，允许过境俄罗斯石油绕过制裁的30天新延期再次涵盖了超过1亿桶石油。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045435116437016659/photo/1 据路透社报道，美国已将允许各国购买受制裁俄罗斯石油的豁免期延长至5月16日。https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the US due to the maritime blockade and excessive demands - Tasnim. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 由于海上封锁和过分要求，伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判 - 塔斯尼姆通讯社。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 The Strait of Hormuz was not blocked and will not be blocked. Commercial ships can pass through it under Iranian control, NTV quoted the deputy head of the Islamic Republic's Foreign Ministry, Khatibzadeh, as saying. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 霍尔木兹海峡没有被封锁，也不会被封锁。据NTV援引伊朗伊斯兰共和国外交部副部长哈提卜扎德的话称，商业船只可以在伊朗的控制下通过该海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has not yet agreed to the next round of negotiations with the United States. Tehran cited U.S. President Trump’s announcement of a continued naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz and “excessive demands” by the US in the talks. Iran has informed Washington through the Pakistani mediator that it will not waste time on drawn‑out and futile negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗尚未同意与美国进行下一轮谈判。德黑兰方面援引了美国总统特朗普关于继续对霍尔木兹海峡实施海上封锁的声明，以及美国在谈判中提出的“过分要求”。伊朗已通过巴基斯坦调解人告知华盛顿，它不会在旷日持久且徒劳的谈判上浪费时间。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Strait of Hormuz tanker traffic update (last few hours): • CRAVE (IMO: 9045807) – LPG/Chemical Tanker 🇲🇱 • GARDIAN (IMO: 9114581) – LPG Tanker 🇦🇴 • TORIN (IMO: 9281566) – Oil/Chemical Tanker 🇵🇦 • RAINE (IMO: 9223540) – LPG Tanker 🇬🇳 • NV AQUAMARINE (IMO: 9307736) – LPG Tanker 🇻🇳 Note: These Tankers are U.S. OFAC Sanctioned (Shadow Fleet) 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: The Spectator Index In effect, the Iranian military has closed the Strait of Hormuz again, saying the US must lift the blockade before the Strait is re-opened. tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》：实际上，伊朗军方再次关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，称美国必须先解除封锁，海峡才会重新开放。推文

text: Zohran Mamdani: To be told a city-run grocery store is implausible, but $500 million/day to kill people in Iran & Lebanon is necessary, speaks to a broken politics.
text_zh: 佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）：有人说由城市经营的杂货店是不可信的，但每天花费5亿美元在伊朗和黎巴嫩杀人却是必要的，这说明政治已经崩溃了。

text: Students Abducted in Armed Bus Ambush in Nigeria, Benue State Nigeria: Gunmen abducted students from a bus in Benue state Friday, officials said, as kidnappings surge nationwide. Data shows Nigeria's bandit violence is a worsening security crisis targeting civilians & students. READ MORE
text_zh: 尼日利亚贝努埃州发生武装伏击劫持学生事件：官员称，周五在尼日利亚贝努埃州，武装分子从一辆巴士上劫持了学生，全国范围内的绑架事件激增。数据显示，尼日利亚的土匪暴力活动是一场针对平民和学生的日益严重的治安危机。阅读更多

text: 🇷🇺 In Russia, they have developed a unique anti-drone net - it can self-tighten after it's been damaged. "Its cell has the shape of a Latin letter Z. When a drone explodes, the structure doesn't tear into pieces but its neighboring cells shift and partially close the hole. This reduces the net area of the breach to 50%, and it becomes much harder to use the same corridor for infiltration," the manufacturer explained. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯研发出一种独特的反无人机网——它在受损后可以自动收紧。“其网格呈拉丁字母Z形。当无人机爆炸时，结构不会碎裂，而是相邻的网格会发生位移并部分闭合缺口。这使网孔的破损面积减少了50%，使得后续无人机更难利用同一通道进行渗透，”制造商解释道。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇬🇧 The IRGC intelligence service arrested members of espionage cells from the USA, Israel, and the UK in the provinces of Mazandaran, Kerman, and Eastern Azerbaijan, which were preparing military aggression and engaged in armament, sabotage, smuggling, and organizing riots. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇬🇧 伊斯兰革命卫队情报部门在马赞达兰省、克尔曼省和东阿塞拜疆省逮捕了来自美国、以色列和英国的间谍小组成员，他们正在筹备军事侵略，并从事武装、破坏、走私和组织骚乱活动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated Iran says it has closed the Strait of Hormuz again over a US blockade. The IRGC says the US did not fulfill its obligations. An Iranian official told Fars that if the US naval blockade of Iranian ports continues, it will be treated as a ceasefire violation. He said the Strait of Hormuz transit route would be closed. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：伊朗称因美国封锁再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡。伊斯兰革命卫队表示美国未履行其义务。一位伊朗官员告诉法尔斯通讯社，如果美国继续对伊朗港口实施海军封锁，将被视为违反停火协议。他表示霍尔木兹海峡的过境路线将被关闭。——WarTranslated推文

text: The Spectator Index Iranian state media says the Strait of Hormuz is back under 'strict management and control' of the military. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：伊朗官方媒体称霍尔木兹海峡已重新处于军方的“严格管理和控制”之下。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @laurnorman : Late Friday night, despite the promises otherwise, another gift for the Kremlin. Oil sanctions waiver extended. JUST IN: Two days after saying the U.S. would NOT renew sanctions waivers on Russian or Iranian oil, Bessent’s Treasury quietly extended a license allowing Russian oil transactions for another month. https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2045307804576358619/photo/1 - MeidasTouch tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @laurnorman：周五深夜，尽管此前有承诺，但又给克里姆林宫送了一份大礼。石油制裁豁免期延长。突发：在声称美国将不会延长对俄罗斯或伊朗石油的制裁豁免两天后，贝森特的财政部悄悄延长了一项允许俄罗斯石油交易的许可，为期一个月。https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2045307804576358619/photo/1 ——MeidasTouch推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @detresfa_ : The Pakistan Navy continues its deployments in the Gulf of Oman, likely securing its energy-linked interests, as multiple Pakistan-flagged tankers carrying oil products transit the region en route to Karachi https://twitter.com/detresfa_/status/2045411427406545175/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @detresfa_：巴基斯坦海军继续在阿曼湾部署，可能是在保护其与能源相关的利益，多艘悬挂巴基斯坦国旗的油轮正载着石油产品途经该地区前往卡拉奇 https://twitter.com/detresfa_/status/2045411427406545175/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The spokesperson of #Iran 's military operations room says Iran is rescinding its previous decision to allow a limited number of oil tankers and commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, due to the continuation of the US blockade tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz：#伊朗 军事作战室发言人表示，由于美国持续封锁，伊朗正在撤销此前允许有限数量油轮和商船通过霍尔木兹海峡的决定。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @ZelenskyyUa : Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi delivered his report. First of all, regarding the front line – I am grateful to all our units that are holding their positions and repelling Russian assaults. The high pace of eliminating occupiers continues in April. The Russians are not succeeding in seizing the initiative on the front, and that is important. We are also observing attempts by the occupying forces to regroup – most likely in order to compensate for a shortage of personnel. In this context, it is becoming increasingly clear why military activity in Belarus has increased. According to intelligence, the construction of roads toward Ukrainian territory and the development of artillery positions are underway in the Belarusian border areas. We believe that Russia may once again attempt to drag Belarus into its war. I have instructed that appropriate channels be used to warn the de facto leadership of Belarus about Ukraine’s readiness to defend its land and independence. The nature and consequences of recent events in Venezuela should serve as a warning to the Belarusian leadership against making mistakes. We also discussed with the Commander-in-Chief our further long-range operations. Glory to Ukraine! tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @ZelenskyyUa：总司令亚历山大·瑟尔斯基提交了他的报告。首先是关于前线的情况——我感谢所有坚守阵地并击退俄罗斯进攻的部队。四月份消灭占领者的步伐依然很快。俄罗斯人在前线未能夺取主动权，这一点很重要。我们还观察到占领军试图进行重组——很可能是为了弥补人员短缺。在此背景下，白俄罗斯军事活动增加的原因变得越来越清晰。据情报显示，白俄罗斯边境地区正在修建通往乌克兰领土的道路并部署炮兵阵地。我们认为俄罗斯可能再次试图将白俄罗斯拖入战争。我已指示通过适当渠道警告白俄罗斯事实上的领导层，乌克兰已做好保卫国土和独立的准备。委内瑞拉近期事件的性质和后果应成为白俄罗斯领导层避免犯错的警示。我们还与总司令讨论了我们进一步的远程行动。荣耀属于乌克兰！推文

text: Demolitions are ongoing in many towns all through the night and this morning A neighborhood after a neighborhood in a very heinous Israeli war crime Houses that we will be begging someone to fund to rebuild when they should have not been allowed to be demolished! The cunt Lebanese president and PM have no comments ofc. The Lebanese army is silent. Again, a new drone strike happened in Lebanon near Hadatha. It injured a Syrian laborer
text_zh: 整个夜晚到今天早上，许多城镇都在进行拆除工作。在极其令人发指的以色列战争罪行中，一个又一个街区被毁。这些房屋本不该被允许拆除，而现在我们却要乞求他人资助重建！那个混蛋黎巴嫩总统和总理当然没有任何评论。黎巴嫩军队保持沉默。此外，黎巴嫩哈达萨附近再次发生无人机袭击，造成一名叙利亚工人受伤。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran's military spokesman announced that the strait of Hormuz has been closed to shipping due to the ongoing US naval blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗军方发言人宣布，由于美国持续的海上封锁，霍尔木兹海峡已对航运关闭。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran says the Strait of Hormuz is back under strict military control because of the American blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗称，由于美国的封锁，霍尔木兹海峡已恢复严格的军事管制。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Spokesperson of the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters: Control of the Strait of Hormuz has returned to its previous state 🔹 The Islamic Republic of Iran, following prior agreements reached in negotiations, had—acting in good faith—agreed to allow a limited number of oil tankers and commercial vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz in a managed manner. However, the United States, with its record of repeated violations, continues acts of piracy and maritime theft under the pretext of a so-called blockade. 🔹 For this reason, control over the Strait of Hormuz has reverted to its previous state, and this strategic strait is now under strict management and control of the armed forces. 🔹 As long as the United States does not allow full freedom of navigation for vessels traveling to and from Iran, the situation in the Strait of Hormuz will remain under strict control and in its previous state. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人：霍尔木兹海峡的控制权已恢复至此前状态 🔹 伊朗伊斯兰共和国此前根据谈判达成的协议，本着诚意，同意允许有限数量的油轮和商船以受控方式通过霍尔木兹海峡。然而，美国凭借其屡次违约的记录，继续以所谓的封锁为借口进行海盗和海上盗窃行为。 🔹 因此，对霍尔木兹海峡的控制权已恢复至此前状态，这一战略海峡目前处于武装部队的严格管理和控制之下。 🔹 只要美国不允许往返伊朗的船只享有完全的航行自由，霍尔木兹海峡的局势将保持严格管控并维持此前状态。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: BREAKING: Iran says it has once again closed the Strait of Hormuz because of the American blockade.
text_zh: 突发：伊朗称由于美国的封锁，已再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡。

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @RKhanizadeh : Iran has partially opened its airspace over the east of the country, the Civil Aviation Organisation has told Tasnim news agency. Some airports have also reopened as of today, 7 am local time (0330 GMT). tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @RKhanizadeh ：伊朗民航组织告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社，伊朗已部分开放该国东部的领空。截至当地时间今天上午7点（格林威治标准时间0330），部分机场也已重新开放。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iranian state-run press agency Tasnim openly criticized Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi for his tweet in which he announced that the Strait of Hormuz would be open for commercial shipping for the time being of the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon/Hezbollah. توئیت بد و ناقص عراقچی و ابهام‌سازی نادرست درباره بازگشایی تنگه هرمز وزیر خارجه کشورمان دقایقی پیش در توئیتی نوشت که پیرو آتش‌بس در لبنان، تنگه هرمز برای عبور کشتی‌های تجاری برای مدت باقی‌مانده از زمان آتش‌بس به صورت کامل باز خواهد بود - خبرگزاری تسنیم tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）伊朗官方通讯社塔斯尼姆公开批评伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希，此前他在推文中宣布，在以色列与黎巴嫩/真主党停火期间，霍尔木兹海峡将对商业航运开放。阿拉格希糟糕且不完整的推文以及关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的错误模糊表述。我国外交部长几分钟前发推文称，随着黎巴嫩停火，霍尔木兹海峡将在停火剩余时间内对商船完全开放——塔斯尼姆通讯社 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) At least two fires broke out on the territory of Syzran oil refinery located in southwestern Russia following Ukrainian strikes last night. Huge cloud of smoke is seen rising over the area. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2045410727586922608/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）昨晚在乌克兰袭击后，位于俄罗斯西南部的塞兹兰炼油厂境内至少发生了两起火灾。可以看到巨大的烟云在区域上方升起。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2045410727586922608/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Japan to set to supply Australia with warships in $7 billion deal, the biggest since Tokyo ended its military export ban in 2014. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 日本将向澳大利亚提供军舰，交易额达70亿美元，这是自东京2014年结束军事出口禁令以来的最大一笔交易。推文

text: 🇺🇦 💥 Footage of the night drone attack on an energy facility in the Chernigov region According to the local energy company, 380 thousand subscribers were left without electricity supply. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💥 切尔尼戈夫地区能源设施夜间遭无人机袭击的画面。据当地能源公司称，38万用户电力供应中断。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Reporter: You said everything has been agreed to. Iran was saying something different. Trump: They have to say something different because they have people they have to cater to. I’m just saying it like it is.
text_zh: 记者：你说一切都已经达成一致。伊朗的说法却不同。特朗普：他们必须说点不同的，因为他们有需要迎合的人。我只是实话实说。

text: Trump: If we don't do a deal, we will get the nuclear dust in a different form — in a much more unfriendly form.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果我们不达成协议，我们将以另一种形式——一种更不友好的形式——受到核尘埃的影响。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Delusional Donny boasts: “I ended 8 wars, add Iran and Lebanon for 10!” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 妄想狂唐尼吹嘘道：“我结束了8场战争，加上伊朗和黎巴嫩就是10场！” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: US Sanctions UAE-backed RSF's Colombian Mercenary Network in Sudan U.S. Treasury Department imposed sanctions on networks recruiting merciaries from Columbia to fight for UAE-backed RSF in Sudan, fueling conflict & famine in a volatile region. Washington has also urged a 3-month truce with no conditions. READ MORE
text_zh: 美国制裁阿联酋支持的苏丹快速支援部队（RSF）的哥伦比亚雇佣兵网络。美国财政部对招募哥伦比亚雇佣兵为阿联酋支持的苏丹快速支援部队作战的网络实施了制裁，这些雇佣兵加剧了该动荡地区的冲突和饥荒。华盛顿还敦促进行为期3个月的无条件停火。阅读更多

text: 📸 Trump
text_zh: 📸 特朗普

text: 🇮🇷 Iran has opened its airspace and some airports for the first time since February 28, the country's aviation authorities reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 据伊朗航空当局报告，伊朗已于2月28日以来首次开放其领空和部分机场。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical Ships have begun using Iran's approved route through the Strait of Hormuz this morning. At least 8 tankers have managed to pass, while numerous other ships are loitering short of the crossing or have turned back. AIS via @MarineTraffic . https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045405534027661635/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：今天早上，船只已开始使用伊朗批准的霍尔木兹海峡航线。至少有8艘油轮成功通过，而其他许多船只则在过境点前徘徊或已掉头。AIS数据来自 @MarineTraffic 。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045405534027661635/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @avischarf : REUTERS: A convoy of tankers seen departing the Gulf and transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday. Here's MarineTraffic video showing it https://twitter.com/avischarf/status/2045393645059059862/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @avischarf ：路透社：周六看到一支油轮船队离开海湾并穿过霍尔木兹海峡。这是MarineTraffic显示的视频 https://twitter.com/avischarf/status/2045393645059059862/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated US has extended the waiver allowing countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil until May 16, Reuters reports. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：据路透社报道，美国已延长豁免期，允许各国购买受制裁的俄罗斯石油，直至5月16日。https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton Disappears Over Strait of Hormuz After Emergency On April 9, a U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton reconnaissance drone on patrol in the Strait of Hormuz turned towards Iran, emitted an automated “code 7700” alert -- a general signal used…" 🇺🇸 🇯🇴 ⚡️ US Navy deploys MQ-4C Triton UAV from Sigonella to Prince Hasan Air Base in Jordan The high-altitude surveillance drone (registration 169661) arrived on April 18 after a direct flight across the Mediterranean. This follows the loss of another MQ-4C Triton , valued at approximately $240 million, which 'crashed' over the Persian Gulf on April 9.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 美国海军 MQ-4C“人鱼海神”无人机在霍尔木兹海峡上空紧急情况后失踪。4月9日，一架在霍尔木兹海峡巡逻的美国海军 MQ-4C“人鱼海神”侦察无人机转向伊朗方向，并发出自动“7700代码”警报——这是一种通用的信号……” 🇺🇸 🇯🇴 ⚡️ 美国海军将 MQ-4C“人鱼海神”无人机从西戈内拉部署至约旦哈桑王子空军基地。这架高空监视无人机（注册号 169661）在横跨地中海直飞后，于4月18日抵达。此前，另一架价值约2.4亿美元的 MQ-4C“人鱼海神”无人机于4月9日在波斯湾上空“坠毁”。

text: WarTranslated Russia's Defense Ministry claims air defenses shot down 258 Ukrainian drones overnight. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯国防部声称防空系统昨晚击落了 258 架乌克兰无人机。推文

text: WarTranslated The fire at the Tuapse oil port continues. Aerial view. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045400915918598528/video/1 The General Staff confirms a strike on the Tuapse oil refinery. The fire has been burning for more than 15 hours. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 图阿普谢石油港口的火灾仍在持续。航拍画面。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045400915918598528/video/1 总参谋部证实对图阿普谢炼油厂进行了打击。火势已持续燃烧超过 15 小时。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044879521766158349/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: WarTranslated Air defenses are active over Russian Tolyatti right now. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045400187221250167/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯陶里亚蒂上空目前防空系统正在运作。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045400187221250167/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Overnight, Russia’s Novokuybyshevsk and Syzran refineries were attacked. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045399650199363755/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 昨晚，俄罗斯的新古比雪夫斯克和塞兹兰炼油厂遭到袭击。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045399650199363755/video/1 推文
